name: Omer Avital
abstract: Omer Avital (Hebrew: עומר אביטל; born May 13, 1971, Givatayim, Israel) is an Israeli-American jazz bassist, composer and bandleader.

concerts.label: 3 Cohens Sextet: Anat, Avishai, and Yuval

about_quotes.speaker: Anat Cohen
about_quotes.evidence: there was a bass player that I knew since I was in high school, used to play with my older brother Yuval, his name is Omer Avital
about_quotes.doc_title: Anat Cohen interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 9, 2021
